findings.description: Merged table cells were split in the HTML conversion, resulting in duplicated text.
findings.evidence: In the table rows for 11/14/2013 and 9/11/2014, a single cell spans columns 2 and 3 in the PDF. In the HTML, these merged cells are split into two separate cells for each column, and the text is duplicated in both.

findings.description: Multiple <h1> tags are used in the document, violating the rule that only one <h1> is acceptable as the document title.
findings.evidence:
The HTML contains both

Agenda

on page 1 and

Jordan Lake Water Supply Storage Allocation - Updated Schedule

on page 2.

findings.description: Merged cells from the PDF table are represented by duplicating the cell text across multiple standard cells rather than using rowspan or colspan attributes.
findings.evidence: In the HTML table, 'EMC Model Approval' is duplicated across four rows in column 4. Similarly, the text for the 11/14/2013 and 9/11/2014 rows is duplicated in both columns 2 and 3.
